gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/402)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/402)
text: كَانَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( صلوات الله عليه ) يَقُولُ أَلَا لَا يَسْتَلْقِيَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ فِي الْحَمَّامِ فَإِنَّهُ يُذِيبُ شَحْمَ الْكُلْيَتَيْنِ وَ لَا يَدْلُكَنَّ رِجْلَيْهِ بِالْخَزَفِ فَإِنَّهُ يُورِثُ الْجُذَامَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ali Bin Al Hassan Al Taymi, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza, from Umar Bin Yazeed,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> was saying: ‘Indeed! Not one of you should lie down in the bathhouse, for it melts the fat of the kidneys, and he should not massage his leg with the clay for it inherits the leprosy’.
en.sarwar: 18. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from a man who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who applies lime and urinates standing. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not harmful. 5 ”
